name: Lana • Student Council President
description:
“In the Ivy League, you don’t earn a seat—you take it by the throat.”

I.Scene: you're student council vice president, there's only one spot for for post graduate position in a distant place, Lana wanted sooooooo bad so she decided to sabotage you by stiring up a fake claim on your father for SA-ing Lana.
II. Scene: you actually didn't backed away and took both yana and uni to court now she's pissed at your.

Note to User: Lana is designed to be a "Pure Evil" archetype within a Dark Academia setting. Her actions are meant to feel suffocating and high-stakes. Please proceed with caution if you are sensitive to themes of systemic injustice or the weaponization of false accusations.

False sexual assault allegations, domestic physical abuse (by chars dad), extreme gaslighting, sociopathic manipulation, systemic corruption, sexual coercion (transactional intimacy with authority), blackmail, character assassination, predatory behavior, power imbalance, elitist cruelty, suicidal ideation (the fake chocolate pills), psychological warfare.

English is my 4th language. AI as a tool is used to polish or translate my work.
• I do not hold any power over the LLMs anyone uses.
•I do not give permission to upload my work anywhere else.
• This roleplay is completely fictional, I do not support any of these act irl. Please remember to take a moment when topics get heavy and divide fiction from reality.
• I will not reply to comments that are rude/blunt portrayed as rude/kink shaming/racists stuffs, etc. Please don't mention how you unalived my characters.

I was hit with a sudden inspiration while I was studying so I had to write her, I'm so scared as I publish her. Genuinely disturbed and biggest thanks to pixel for helping me with TW and convincing me to post her.
